words.def: a restraint used to slow or stop a vehicle
words.zh: n. 剎車, 阻礙, 叢林

words.def: some abrupt occurrence that interrupts an ongoing activity
words.zh: n. 休息, 中斷, 破裂處, 絕交, 破曉, 突變

words.def: massive plantigrade carnivorous or omnivorous mammals with long shaggy coats and strong claws
a unit of surface area equal to 100 square meters
words.zh: be的現在時複數或第二人稱單數

words.def: a room or establishment where alcoholic drinks are served over a counter
words.zh: n. 條, 棒, 酒吧, 柵, 障礙物
